  • [ - ] CraigGoodwin - member since 17-May-25

    @Easyanalyses It is difficult for Barcelona to win the game. Bilbao's home defense is very advanced. William Hill is currently inducing bets on Barcelona with super high water. I think Barcelona is likely to lose the game directly. According to Barcelona's strength, the away game is given a 0.25 goal concession, which is not enough to support Barcelona to win the game. I think Bilbao will win the game directly. Let's refer to the game between Sevilla and Real Madrid. At that time, the handicap was also Real Madrid's 0.25 goal concession, which shows that the game was extremely tense. In the end, Real Madrid won the game with difficulty after two Sevilla players were sent off.
